string.name: internet_permission_reason
string.value: 用于远程桌面连接和数据传输

string.name: network_permission_reason
string.value: 用于检测网络状态和连接质量

string.name: float_window_permission_reason
string.value: 用于显示远程桌面悬浮窗

string.name: storage_permission_reason
string.value: 用于保存会话日志和传输文件

string.name: background_permission_reason
string.value: 用于保持远程桌面连接在后台运行

string.name: screen_capture_permission_reason
string.value: 用于捕获本地屏幕并传输到远端

string.name: pasteboard_permission_reason
string.value: 用于读取剪贴板内容并同步文本

string.name: camera_permission_reason
string.value: 用于远程视频通话和屏幕共享

string.name: location_permission_reason
string.value: 用于发现局域网内的远程设备

string.name: notification_permission_reason
string.value: 用于显示连接状态和消息提醒

string.name: bluetooth_permission_reason
string.value: 用于通过蓝牙连接远程设备

string.name: open_link_permission_reason
string.value: 用于打开浏览器完成账户登录认证

string.name: device_name_permission_reason
string.value: 用于获取本机设备名称显示在共享页面
